nodes.name: linux-ext4-allmodes
nodes.build_cmd: gcc -O2 -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -D_GNU_SOURCE -D_POSIX_C_SOURCE=200809L -Iinclude -o optbinlog_bench_linux optbinlog_bench.c src/optbinlog_shared.c src/optbinlog_eventlog.c src/optbinlog_binlog.c && sudo -n sh -c 'for p in /sys/kernel/tracing/tracing_on /sys/kernel/debug/tracing/tracing_on; do if [ -w "$p" ]; then echo 1 > "$p"; exit 0; fi; done; exit 1'
